keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.name: Favorit supplier settings
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.description: Controls connection settings for the Favorit supplier integration.
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.input.invalid: Invalid Favorit supplier settings data was provided.
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.is.enabled.name: Integration enabled
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.is.enabled.desc: Enables or disables the Favorit supplier integration.
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.base.url.name: Base URL
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.base.url.descri: Base URL used to send requests to the Favorit supplier API.
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.api.key.name: API key
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.api.key.descrip: API key used to authorize requests to the Favorit supplier API.
keyValues.supplier.favorit.setting.has.api.key.des: Shows whether an API key is stored for the Favorit supplier integration.
